title: Nursery Rhyme. DCX. Local.
content:
Little lad, little lad, where wast thou born?
        Far off in Lancashire, under a thorn,
        Where they sup sour milk in a ram's horn.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DCX. Local.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
